top_projects.name: ClariBot
top_projects.description: An embeddable AI support widget using RAG for hallucination-free answers. Implemented a smart RAG engine with pgvector for similarity searching and an insights engine to cluster user intent and detect user frustration.

top_projects.name: Gradonix (GradoAI)
top_projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered educational platform for automated subjective hand-written evaluation. Features automated OCR answer extraction, grading, and role-based authentication for test creation and result publishing.

top_projects.name: FrictaAI
top_projects.description: An AI-native autonomous UX intelligence platform that emulates user personas to detect cognitive fatigue, design flaws, and layout defects on target websites using a monorepo architecture.

top_projects.name: Attendance Management System
top_projects.description: A RESTful system for tracking attendance with role-based access for teachers and students, featuring an optimized normalized database schema.

repository_summary.ClariBot: RAG-driven support widget with query clustering and frustration detection.
repository_summary.FrictaAI: Autonomous UX testing platform simulating user personas to detect usability friction.
repository_summary.grado_next: AI-powered educational management system for automated OCR grading.
repository_summary.AttendanceManagementSystem: Java-based RESTful API for student attendance tracking.
